subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! This sacred dwelling-place of the All-Merciful is perfumed with holy fragrances, and divine mysteries are diffused through spiritual means [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد للّه اين موطن مقدّس رحمن بنفحات قدس معطّر است و اسرار الهيّه بوسائط رحمانيّه منتشر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @past, present and future of Iran
